subject: Re: Leon - time off
body:
i still don't have an answer regarding his son's
graduation//have him talk to me tomorrow

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> Leon told me that he has made plans to go off island
> for the Easter holidays
> (April 14, 15, 16 and 17).  I asked if he mentioned
> it to JE and he said no.
> I told him that I thought JE would be here but I
> would check.  Please,
> please let me know ASAP.  I would like to tell Leon
> tomorrow especially if
> he cannot go.
> 
> 
> 
> Thanks,
> 
> 
> 
> Cecile
>

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Leon told me that he has made plans to go off island
for the Easter holidays
(April 14, 15, 16 and 17). I asked if he mentioned
it to JE and he said no.
I told him that I thought JE would be here but I
would check. Please,
please let me know ASAP. I would like to tell Leon
tomorrow especially if
he cannot go.

Thanks,

Cecile
